nasb.text: I have been young and now I am old, Yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken Or his descendants begging bread.

esv.text: I have been young, and now am old, yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken or his children begging for bread.

cnv.text: 我從前年幼，現在年老， 從未見過義人被棄， 也從未見過他的後裔討飯。

ccb.text: 从幼年到老年， 我从未见过义人遭弃， 也未见其后人讨饭。

csbs.text: 我曾经年少，现在老了， 却从来没有见过义人被离弃， 也没有见过他的后裔讨饭。
